summary: Frontend-only testing of UnifiedMessagesHub consolidation. Fixed critical React import bug. All role-based restrictions working correctly. Old routes properly removed.
critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: React import was missing in AdminPanel.js line 1 - caused 'React is not defined' error when clicking on chat items in UnifiedMessagesHub
UnifiedMessagesHub correctly implements role-based category filtering
Decision buttons (Одобрить/Отклонить) properly displayed for shop applications, merchant applications, P2P disputes, and support tickets
Role colors implemented correctly per specification
context_for_next_testing_agent: UnifiedMessagesHub is fully functional. React import bug fixed. All 4 roles tested with correct access restrictions.

1_login_admin.details: Login with admin/000000 successful, redirected to /admin

6_unified_messages_hub_loads.details: UnifiedMessagesHub loads at /admin/messages with 'Центр сообщений' title

7_categories_visible_admin.details: Admin sees all categories: Все, P2P Споры, Заявки мерчантов, Маркетплейс, Заявки магазинов, Поддержка, Пользователям

8_categories_visible_mod_p2p.details: mod_p2p sees only: Все, P2P Споры, Заявки мерчантов

9_categories_visible_mod_market.details: mod_market sees only: Все, Маркетплейс, Заявки магазинов

11_sidebar_restrictions_mod_p2p.details: mod_p2p sees: Управление, P2P Торговля, Мерчанты, Сообщения. Does NOT see: Маркетплейс, Настройки

12_sidebar_restrictions_mod_market.details: mod_market sees: Маркетплейс, Сообщения. Does NOT see: Управление, P2P Торговля, Мерчанты, Настройки

13_sidebar_restrictions_support.details: support sees only: Сообщения. Does NOT see: Управление, P2P Торговля, Мерчанты, Маркетплейс, Настройки

14_decision_buttons_shop_app.details: Shop application shows buttons: Запросить детали, Одобрить, Отклонить

15_chat_messages_display.details: Chat messages display correctly with role colors

16_message_input_visible.details: Message input field visible at bottom of chat

bug_fixed.issue: React is not defined error in UnifiedMessagesHub
bug_fixed.fix: Added React to import statement: import React, { useState, useEffect, useRef } from 'react'
bug_fixed.root_cause: React.createElement was used on line 2790 but React was not imported
